assertion.title: Physics template seeding in initial population improves GP exact matches from 30/50 to 33/50
assertion.statement: Seeding 20% of the initial GP population with parameterized physics templates (relativistic factor, exponential decay, trig compositions, power laws, Gaussian, logistic, Doppler patterns) provides structural building blocks that GP refines via crossover and mutation, improving exact matches from 30/50 to 33/50 (+3 net). Gained eq13 (Compton Scattering), eq18 (Doppler), eq26 (Relativistic Momentum), eq30 (Relativistic Energy); lost eq45 (Standing Wave). Results are deterministic across two identical full benchmark runs.
